summary: Allogo Taxi App - Core Features Testing Complete. Backend: 23/24 tests passed (95.8%). Frontend: All login flows (passenger, driver, admin) working. All dashboard features functional.

minor.issue: Returns 404 'Ride not found' instead of empty array when no scheduled rides exist
minor.note: Code looks correct (returns []) but error suggests response validation issue with RideResponse model

issues: Geolocation permission warning shown - expected UX flow

passed_tests: ✅ Backend: Fare estimation for standard vehicle
✅ Backend: Fare estimation for van with extra passengers
✅ Frontend: Homepage loads with Allogo branding
✅ Frontend: Passenger dashboard - booking form visible
✅ Frontend: Passenger dashboard - vehicle type buttons (Standard/Van)
✅ Frontend: Passenger dashboard - passenger count controls (+/-)
✅ Frontend: Passenger dashboard - estimate button validates addresses
✅ Frontend: Passenger dashboard - menu opens with navigation links
✅ Frontend: Driver dashboard - availability switch visible and working
✅ Frontend: Driver dashboard - stats cards (today earnings, total, courses, rating)
✅ Frontend: Driver dashboard - toggle earnings visibility button
✅ Frontend: Driver dashboard - menu with profile, vehicle, history, logout
✅ Frontend: Driver vehicle page shows car info and documents section
✅ Frontend: Admin dashboard - overview stats (passengers, drivers, revenue, rides)
✅ Frontend: Admin dashboard - driver statistics table
✅ Frontend: Admin dashboard - recent rides section
✅ Frontend: Map displays with available drivers (ALLOGO markers)
failed_tests: ❌ Backend: GET /api/rides/scheduled - Returns 404 instead of empty array
action_items: MINOR: Review /api/rides/scheduled endpoint - possible issue with RideResponse model validation when returning empty list
context_for_next_testing_agent: Core app functionality fully tested and working. All three user roles (passenger, driver, admin) can login and access their respective dashboards. Key features verified: fare estimation, driver availability toggle, vehicle/passenger selection, admin statistics. Minor issue: scheduled rides endpoint may have response validation bug. Stripe payment integration tested in previous iteration (may need API key validation). Geolocation permissions handled gracefully with user-friendly messages.
